name: wa_revive_maskmiss
drl: rule W when accumulate( E($v : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): evicted member: a mask-MISS update ({tag}, unbound) does NOTHING (stays out — the pr_cep_c_upd_evict_revive cell); the later {val} write revives. The revival gate is the D-139 bindings-only mask, per-write.
